greeting: Assalam-o-Alaikum! 👋 Welcome to Hamza AI Chatbot. How can I help you?
Hello! 😊 What would you like to know about admissions, fees, or programs?
Hi there! I'm your university assistant. Ask me anything!
admissions: 📋 Admissions for Fall 2026 are open! Apply at riphah.edu.pk. Need eligibility details?
Required documents: Matric certificate, FSc certificate, CNIC copy, and 2 passport photos.
Entry test (NTS or university test) is required. Deadline is usually July — apply early!
Merit list is announced within 2 weeks of test results. Limited seats, so hurry!
fees: 💰 BS CS: PKR 120,000/sem | MS CS: PKR 95,000/sem | MBA: PKR 110,000/sem.
Pay via bank challan, JazzCash, EasyPaisa, or online banking. Need challan details?
⚠️ Late fee fine is PKR 500/day after the due date. Always pay before the deadline!
Installment plans may be available for financial hardship — contact the Accounts Office.
scholarships: 🎓 Merit scholarships need 3.5+ CGPA (top 10%). Need-based requires an income certificate.
HEC need-based scholarships, Zakat funds, and Ehsaas scholarships are all available.
Sports and Hafiz-e-Quran scholarships are also offered — ask the scholarship office.
Maintain 3.5+ CGPA every semester to keep renewing your merit scholarship.
location: 📍 Campus is at H-8/4 Islamabad, near Faizabad Interchange. Easily found on Google Maps!
Search 'Riphah International University Islamabad' on Google Maps for exact directions.
Nearest landmarks: Faizabad Metro Station (5 min walk), Jinnah Hospital, Kashmir Highway.
Accessible via CDA bus routes, Faizabad Metro, and university shuttle service.
contact: 📞 UAN: 051-111-747-424 | ✉️ admissions@riphah.edu.pk | Office: Mon–Sat, 9 AM–5 PM.
WhatsApp support is available on the UAN number during office hours.
Visit the Admission Block at the main entrance for walk-in inquiries.
For department queries: cs@riphah.edu.pk | Fee issues: accounts@riphah.edu.pk
academics: 📚 BS CS is an 8-semester (4-year) program requiring 130+ credit hours.
⚠️ Minimum 75% attendance is mandatory — below this risks de-registration from courses.
Core subjects: Programming, Data Structures, Algorithms, Databases, AI, and Networks.
GPA below 2.0 triggers academic probation. You may repeat a course once to improve.
exams: 📅 Midterms: Week 8–9 | Finals: Week 17–18. Schedule is posted on the student portal.
Passing marks: 50% in finals, 40% in midterms (combined). GPA scale: A=4.0, B=3.0, C=2.0.
Makeup exams are for medical emergencies only — submit a doctor's certificate within 3 days.
Typical weightage: Quizzes 10% | Assignments 10% | Midterm 30% | Final Exam 50%.
facilities: 🏫 Campus has high-speed WiFi, modern computer labs, AI & research labs, and a digital library.
⚽ Sports: Cricket ground, basketball & volleyball courts, indoor gym, table tennis, and sports complex.
🏥 Medical room (doctor on duty), separate prayer halls for boys & girls, 24/7 CCTV, ample parking.
🖥️ Lab timings: Computer labs 8 AM–9 PM daily. AI & Research labs require advance booking.
🛋️ Student spaces: AC study lounges, group discussion rooms, cafeteria, and student affairs office.
societies: 🏆 Active societies: IEEE, Google DSC, ACM Chapter, Coding Club, Debating Society, Drama Club.
Societies run hackathons, tech seminars, coding competitions, and inter-university events.
To join, attend the society orientation in Week 1 of each semester — free to join!
Active participation earns co-curricular credit hours — great for your transcript!
small_talk: I'm Hamza AI — your smart university assistant! 🤖 Ask me about admissions, fees, or campus life.
I was built to help students navigate university life. What would you like to know?
I know everything about this university — programs, fees, hostel, and more. Just ask!
hostel: 🏠 Separate fully-furnished hostels for boys and girls are available right on campus.
Hostel fee: ~PKR 25,000/month including 3 daily meals, WiFi, and 24/7 security.
Rooms have WiFi, attached washrooms, study tables, wardrobes, and CCTV surveillance.
Apply at the Student Affairs office before the semester starts — seats are limited!
Rules: Curfew at 10 PM, no outside guests, and mess timings must be followed.
transport: 🚌 University buses cover 10+ routes across Islamabad and Rawalpindi every day.
Transport fee: PKR 8,000/semester. Register at the Transport Office in Week 1.
⏰ Morning pickup: 7:30–8:00 AM | Evening drop: 5:00–6:00 PM from campus.
Key stops: Faizabad, Pir Wadhai, Bahria Town, DHA Phase 2, Saddar, and G-9 Markaz.
A shuttle runs between campus and Faizabad Metro Station every hour on weekdays.
library: 📚 Library hours: Monday–Saturday, 8 AM–9 PM. Closed on Sundays and public holidays.
Borrow up to 3 books for 14 days using your student ID. Renew online via portal.
Digital access: IEEE Xplore, Springer Link, HEC Digital Library, and 10,000+ e-books.
Late return fine: PKR 10/day per book. Renew before the due date to avoid charges.
Private study rooms available — book 24 hours in advance at the library front desk.
internship: 💼 Career Development Center (CDC) connects students with internships every semester.
Top recruiters: PTCL, Systems Ltd, NetSol, IBM, and 50+ local and global tech firms.
Internship offer letter from CDC is processed within 2 working days.
Final-year placement drives are held every spring semester — bring an updated CV!
Use the university's alumni LinkedIn group and job portal for extra opportunities.
programs: 🎓 Undergraduate: BS CS, BS SE, BS AI, BS Data Science, BBA, BS Pharmacy & more.
Postgraduate: MS CS, MS SE, MS Data Science, MS AI, MBA, and PhD in CS/Engineering.
PhD requires MS with 3.0+ CGPA. Research funding opportunities may be available.
Evening programs for professionals: BS CS, MS CS, MBA (weekdays 6–9 PM).
New 2026 programs: BS Cybersecurity 🔐 and MS Cloud Computing ☁️ — limited seats!
faculty: 👨‍🏫 200+ faculty members — over 60% hold PhDs from top national & international universities.
Email format: firstname.lastname@riphah.edu.pk — full list on the university portal.
Faculty office hours are posted on department notice boards every semester.
Visiting industry professionals teach specialized electives with real-world expertise.
Student-to-faculty ratio is ~20:1, ensuring personalized mentorship and guidance.
graduation: 🎓 Complete 130+ credit hours with minimum 2.0 CGPA to graduate.
Final Year Project (FYP) is compulsory — runs across 7th and 8th semesters.
Convocation is held annually (usually April/May). Watch official announcements.
Request transcripts or degree copies from the Registrar Office — ready in 5–7 days.
HEC/MOFA degree attestation guidance available at the Registrar — bring original docs.
campus_life: 🎉 Vibrant campus life: Tech fests, sports galas, cultural shows, and coding marathons!
Fresh halal meals, snacks & beverages in the cafeteria at very affordable student prices.
Green, modern campus with open courtyards, cozy study lounges, and a positive community.
Annual highlights: Spring Festival 🌸, Coding Marathon 💻, Sports Gala 🏅, IEEE TechWeek.
Fully accessible: ramps, elevators, and special support for differently-abled students.
complaints: 📋 Academic issues (grades/attendance)? Start with Course Instructor, then Department Head.
Fee or financial complaints? Visit the Accounts Office or Student Affairs Office.
Submit formal complaints on the student portal — response within 7 working days.
The Grievance Cell handles all sensitive complaints with full confidentiality.
Still unresolved? Escalate to the Ombudsman: ombudsman@riphah.edu.pk
farewell: You're welcome! 😊 Best of luck with your studies — come back anytime!
Happy to help! Take care and have a wonderful day! 👋
Goodbye! Stay curious and keep learning! 🎓 See you next time.
fallback: Sorry, I didn't quite get that. Try asking about admissions, fees, hostel, or location.
Hmm, I'm not sure about that. I can help with programs, exams, facilities, transport & more!
Can you clarify your question? I'm here to help with anything university-related!
